message:
feat(cli): improve experiment create validation

Add comprehensive input validation for the experiment create command:

1. Scope validation: Reject values other than "skill" or "slice" with
   a clear error message listing valid options

2. Scope-ID consistency: Ensure --scope-id is only provided when scope
   is "slice", and is required when scope is "slice". Previously, users
   could provide --scope-id with scope="skill" which would be silently
   ignored.

3. Duplicate variant detection: Track seen variant IDs using a HashSet
   and reject experiments with duplicate variant IDs. This prevents
   data integrity issues where the same variant ID would appear multiple
   times in the experiment configuration.

These validations provide immediate feedback to users rather than
allowing invalid configurations to be stored in the database.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
